subtitle: A funny birthday slot machine for Robert from Your Family.
bigline: Spin for steak, fishing luck, duct tape glory, recliner naps, and birthday cash from Your Family.
marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Robert's official birthday result.

welcome.title: Welcome to Robert's Birthday Casino
paragraphs: Your Family built this birthday slot machine for Robert, the man who can fix almost anything with duct tape.
Expect steak energy, fishing luck, Yellowstone drama, and one very powerful recliner nap.
Mom is serving as the funny audit person, so all suspicious wins may be lovingly reviewed.
welcome.overrideLine: Mom may object, but Susan, Ethan, and Olivia already approved the birthday fun.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Cash prizes are birthday gifts fulfilled by Your Family, not Playable Greetings.

rules: Cash prizes are birthday gifts from Your Family only.
Playable Greetings does not pay cash prizes.
Show Dad the Official Results screen to claim any cash prize by Venmo.
Mom may audit the results, but she cannot cancel birthday fun.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Robert's official birthday result is certified by Your Family and subject to Mom's playful audit.

footer: Made with love for Robert from Your Family.

customerInputs.oneThingEveryoneKnows: Can fix almost anything with duct tape.

claim.template: Cash prizes are birthday gifts fulfilled by Your Family through Venmo. Show Dad the Official Results screen to claim. Playable Greetings does not pay cash prizes.

slots.marqueeTemplate: Spin {{spinNumber}} of {{spinCount}} for Robert's official birthday result.

prizes.title: Birthday Dad Warmup
prizes.msg: Robert wins the official first round of birthday cheers from the family.

prizes.title: Recliner Power Nap Prize
prizes.msg: Robert wins five dollars and permission to fall asleep in the recliner like a champion.

prizes.title: Duct Tape Repair Medal
prizes.msg: Robert wins recognition for fixing almost anything with duct tape and total confidence.

prizes.title: Family Celebration Cash
prizes.msg: Robert wins ten birthday dollars and a round of family applause.

prizes.title: Steak Dinner Spin
prizes.msg: Robert wins steak-level birthday respect with perfectly grilled dad energy.

prizes.title: Fishing Luck Cash Catch
prizes.msg: Robert wins twenty dollars and the kind of fishing luck every dad claims he already had.

prizes.title: Yellowstone Remote Control Roundup
prizes.msg: Robert wins control of the remote and enough Yellowstone drama to count as a birthday bonus.

prizes.title: Mom Audit Slip
prizes.msg: Mom reviews the spin and confirms Robert is probably allowed to enjoy this win.

prizes.title: Mom Objection Overruled
prizes.msg: Mom raises a playful objection, but Susan, Ethan, and Olivia vote that Robert gets ten dollars.

prizes.title: Family Love Prize
prizes.msg: Robert wins a heartfelt reminder that Susan, Ethan, and Olivia love him more than any jackpot.

prizes.title: Premium Dad Bonus
prizes.msg: Robert wins a premium twenty dollar birthday bonus for being the family fix-it legend.

prizes.title: 777 Robert Birthday Jackpot
prizes.msg: Robert wins the top birthday jackpot of fifty dollars from Your Family by Venmo.
